creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
The present version of the port is for AStyle-1.6.0. Author's
	latest is 1.8.2 as of March 18, 1999.

	My version also removes the dependency on the EGCS compiler,
	which, I believe, makes the port a lot easier to install.

	Instead of patching the author's Makefile I replace it with
	one using bsd.prog.mk.

Fix: The uuencoded tar-ball of the new version of the port is here:
